title: POLAND enforcement action against Polish Postal Service (232,379)
summary: Lack of appointment of data protection officer The Polish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 232,379 on the Polish Postal Service. The controller appointed a person as DPO who also held a managerial position with authority over security and classified information protection issues.
